name: Cobalt Intelligence
description: Cobalt Intelligence provides a business verification API sourcing real-time data from US Secretary of State offices and related registries, helping fintechs and lenders verify corporate identity quickly.

seo.title: Cobalt Intelligence — KYC / KYB / AML API
seo.meta_description: Cobalt Intelligence: Cobalt Intelligence provides a business verification API sourcing real-time data from US Secretary of State offices and related registries,

when_to_use: US business entity verification via Secretary of State data
Real-time corporate identity check for fintech KYB onboarding
Beneficial ownership lookup for AML due diligence
Lender business verification before credit decisioning
Merchant onboarding validation for payment platforms

pros: Real-time data from all 50 US Secretary of State sites
Fast verification for US business identity checks
Useful when Middesk or LexisNexis lag on filings
cons: US-only, no coverage outside SoS registries
Narrower than full KYB suites like Middesk
No UBO, sanctions or PEP screening bundled
Pricing per lookup adds up at scale
review.verdict: US Secretary of State lookups done right, best as a targeted complement to broader KYB stacks.
review.best_for: US lenders and fintechs needing live SoS data for business verification and underwriting
review.not_for: Global KYB programs or teams needing UBO, sanctions and adverse media in one API
